title: DENTAL CLINIC - 211info
text: NEWBERG WELLNESS CENTER DENTAL CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides preventative, general, and emergency dental care (exams, fillings, and simple extractions), dental hygiene services, and pediatric dentistry. 2251 E Hancock Street Suite 100 Newberg, OR 97132 Eligibility: Unrestricted, must meet income guidelines if applying for sliding scale fees. Hours: Monday-Friday 7am-6pm (971) 281-3300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (971) 281-3300 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call to make an appointment. New patients accepted as schedule permits. FEES: Vaires by service with a $30 per visit fee; accepts most insurance, including Oregon Health Plan (OHP), and offers sliding-scale fees for uninsured patients. Limited payment plans for emergencies may be available. DOCUMENTS: Insurance card, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington and Yamhill Counties SITE HOURS: Monday/Friday 8am-5pm, Tuesday/Thursday 10am-7pm, Wednesday 9am-5pm Services: Cavity Prevention Measures Dental Hygiene Dental Prosthodontics Emergency Dental Care Pediatric Dentistry Periodontics Other Services Offered At This Location: GENERAL MEDICAL CARE - PRIMARY CARE HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - WELLNESS CENTER HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NEWBERG WELLNESS CENTER
